findings.control_title: Ensure access keys are rotated every 90 days or less
findings.remediation: For CIS-1.13, rotate IAM access keys that are older than 90 days. AWS IAM documentation: https://docs.aws.amazon.com/IAM/latest/UserGuide/id_credentials_access-keys.html

findings.control_title: Ensure CloudTrail is enabled and configured with at least one multi-Region trail
findings.remediation: For CIS-3.1, configure a multi-Region CloudTrail trail that logs global service events and read/write management events. AWS CloudTrail documentation: https://docs.aws.amazon.com/awscloudtrail/latest/userguide/cloudtrail-create-and-update-a-trail.html

findings.control_title: Ensure CloudTrail is integrated with CloudWatch Logs
findings.remediation: For EHC-CT-1, send CloudTrail events to CloudWatch Logs for operational monitoring. AWS CloudTrail documentation: https://docs.aws.amazon.com/awscloudtrail/latest/userguide/send-cloudtrail-events-to-cloudwatch-logs.html

findings.control_title: Ensure CloudTrail log file validation is enabled
findings.remediation: For CIS-3.2, keep CloudTrail log file validation enabled. AWS CloudTrail documentation: https://docs.aws.amazon.com/awscloudtrail/latest/userguide/cloudtrail-log-file-validation-intro.html
